error_signature: The request is missing a required parameter
title: Malformed request error when using X API
symptom: The user encounters an error stating 'The request is missing a required parameter, includes an invalid parameter value, includes a parameter more than once, or is otherwise malformed.' This indicates issues with the request parameters sent to the X API.
applies_when: Using X API with custom OAuth2 credentials
not_this_if: Using only predefined scopes without issues
Error does not occur with valid parameters
root_cause: This error typically arises when the request to the X API is not properly formatted, which can happen if required parameters are omitted or incorrectly specified. This can also occur if the API does not accept the combination of scopes being used.
fix_steps: Review the parameters being sent in the API request
Ensure all required parameters are included and correctly formatted
Test the API call again after making adjustments
agent_instruction: Check and correct the request parameters sent to the X API.
